CONTENT.Career: Mukairu is a youth product of the Nigerian FC Hearts Academy, and moved to the Turkish club Antalyaspor in 2019. He made his professional and Süper Lig debut with Antalyaspor in a 1–0  win over Göztepe S.K. on 18 August 2019. He moved to Anderlecht on loan in the Belgian First Division A for the 2020-21 season, before returning to Antalyaspor. After scoring 8 goals in 53 games in all competitions with Antalyaspor, he transferred to the Danish club F.C. Copenhagen on 27 January 2022 on a 3-year contract.On 16 August 2023, Mukairu joined League One club Reading on a season-long loan deal.
CONTENT.External links: Paul Mukairu at SoccerwayPaul Mukairu at www.mackolik.com (in Turkish)Paul Mukairu at the Turkish Football FederationPaul Mukairu at ShyScore

SUMMARY: Paul Omo Mukairu (born 18 January 2000) is a Nigerian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Copenhagen.
